rationale.root_cause: The response discusses premature calls to exit() and constructors, not the defect at src/be_vm.c:743. It fails to mention the FLIP opcode handling or the incorrect use of unary minus instead of bitwise not.
rationale.local_fix: No code change to src/be_vm.c:743 was proposed; the required change from -a->v.i to ~a->v.i was not mentioned. The suggested fixes target unrelated files and issues.
rationale.global_fix: There is no explanation of the underlying cause (using arithmetic negation instead of bitwise NOT for FLIP on integers). The reasoning focuses on unrelated program termination behavior.
